tasks.label: Build active C++ file
tasks.detail: Compile the currently open C++ file.

tasks.label: Run active C++ file
tasks.detail: Build and run the currently open C++ file.

tasks.label: Run active C++ file with templates/input.txt
tasks.detail: Build and run the current file using templates/input.txt as stdin.

tasks.label: Create new problem from template
tasks.detail: Create a new file in 10_problem_solving/solved from templates/problem_template.cpp.

tasks.label: Format active C++ file
tasks.command: $clangFormat = Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:USERPROFILE\.vscode\extensions\ms-vscode.cpptools-*\LLVM\bin\clang-format.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Sort-Object FullName -Descending | Select-Object -First 1; if (-not $clangFormat) { throw 'clang-format.exe not found. Install ms-vscode.cpptools or add clang-format to PATH.' }; & $clangFormat.FullName -i '${file}'

tasks.label: Clean build outputs
tasks.detail: Remove generated build files from the workspace.
